params.name: SkyWeb Hub
params.source:
* Fragment Crafting (5.2%), Grandmaster Scrolls (2.1%), Lottery Machine (0.24%), Master Scrolls (1.9%), Super Treasure Maps (5%), TECH Master Scrolls (9.2%), Wishing (0.19%)
* [[Koryeon Domain]] tile 53
params.description:
On May 27, 1969 AD, SkyWeb Hub was invented and widely used in America.
That day, the American Department of Defense officially launched a new type of network connection. All computers under military control joined and began to share information. In the next few years, the number of computers within this network grew exponentially, with billions of messages delivered at any moment. No one could have imagined that when the first network signal was sent out, it awakened a being that would go on to …
